content: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! I'm ready to assist you with any questions or topics you'd like to discuss.

Elon Musk is a South African-born entrepreneur, inventor, and business magnate. He is the CEO and CTO of SpaceX, CEO and product architect of Tesla Inc., and co-founder of Neuralink and The Boring Company.

Tony Stark, also known as Iron Man, is a fictional character and the main protagonist in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) movie franchise. He is a billionaire inventor, industrialist, and philanthropist who creates a powered exoskeleton suit to save his life and later uses it to fight crime and injustice.
